health_conditions: chronic knee pain with limited mobility

benefits.description: Nearly two weeks in, no pain meds or muscle relaxers taken; can bend knee almost completely after not being able to do so in almost 2 years; not in constant pain
Significant improvement in knee mobility and pain relief

protocol_notes: Nearly two weeks into a cycle of BPC-157 for chronic knee pain, tennis elbow, and sciatica. No longer taking pain meds or muscle relaxers.
